nodes.name: Prepare Upload
nodes.notes: Prepare file for Supabase Storage upload

nodes.name: Supabase: Upload Image
nodes.notes: Upload image to Supabase Storage assets/ad-images/ folder. Returns public URL.

content.text:
Analyze this image ad and extract BOTH the visual design AND the copy. You are an expert ad analyst who deconstructs winning ads.

Output ONLY valid JSON with no markdown:
{
  "headline_text": "The main headline text visible on the ad",
  "body_copy": "Any body/supporting text",
  "cta_text": "The call-to-action text (button text, 'Shop Now', etc)",
  "hook_type": "problem_agitate|curiosity|social_proof|contrarian|story|shock|authority|transformation",
  "copy_angle": "What persuasion angle is the copy using?",
  "emotional_appeal": "What emotion does this ad target?",
  "layout_description": "Detailed layout: where is the headline, body copy, CTA, image, logo positioned? What is the visual hierarchy?",
  "color_palette": {"primary": "#hex", "secondary": "#hex", "accent": "#hex", "text": "#hex", "background": "#hex"},
  "font_style": "Bold sans-serif / Script + serif / etc",
  "visual_elements": "What visual elements are used? (product photo, lifestyle image, illustration, icons, badges, before/after)",
  "triggers": ["array", "of", "psychological", "triggers"],
  "recreation_prompt": "A highly detailed prompt to recreate this exact visual style using an AI image generator. Include: exact layout grid (what goes where), typography style and size hierarchy, color scheme with hex codes, image treatment/style, spacing and padding, visual elements and their positions, overall mood and aesthetic. Be extremely specific — this prompt will be used with NanoBanana image generation to create new ads in this exact style but with different copy.",
  "niche": "detected niche category"
}

nodes.name: Claude: Analyze Ad Image (Vision)
nodes.notes: Claude Vision analyzes the image ad — extracts all visible copy AND visual design patterns including a detailed recreation prompt for NanoBanana.
